reviews.content:
가드랑 세트로 사고 싶었는데 품절이라 라이너만 구매 했어요.
색감 참 예쁘게 뽑는 애플사이다레시피!
감각적인 디자인이 매력적인 브랜드인 것 같아요.
유모차가 좀 큰편인데 라지 사이즈 딱 좋아요!
저희집 아가도 좋은지 폭 들어가서 나올줄을 모르네요. ㅎㅎㅎ
가드 어서 재입고 해주세요! 기다릴게요!
reviews.content_en: I wanted to buy the whole set with the guard, but it was out of stock so I just got the liner. The color is so beautifully done with this apple cider recipe! It seems like a brand with a sensible and attractive design. Our stroller is quite big, but the large size is perfect! Our little one loves it so much that once they get in, they don't want to come out. ㅎㅎㅎ Please restock the guard soon! I'll be waiting!

reviews.name: 썸****
reviews.content:
마음에 드는 제품이 없어서 기본 디자인만 하고 다녔는데 디자인이랑 컬러 배색이 너무 귀여워요🤍🤍🤍
보들보들 쿠션감도 좋아서 썸머가 좋아하네요
reviews.content_en: I couldn't find a product I liked so I just went with basic designs, but the design and color combination are so cute 🤍🤍🤍 The soft cushioning feels great and Sommer really loves it

reviews.name: 국****
reviews.content: 폭신폭신하니 엄청 편해하고 방석만 따로 꺼내주면 방석 위에서 자요ㅜㅠㅋㅋㅋ 애사레 방석 깔아주자마자 유모차에서 안나오겠다고 드러눕더라구요…디자인도 너무 예쁘고 뭐하나 빠짐없는 애사레..얼른 가드도 재입고 해주세용 깔맞춤 하고싶어요😭❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️
reviews.content_en: It's so fluffy and incredibly comfortable, and when I take out just the cushion pad, they sleep on it ㅜㅠㅋㅋㅋ As soon as I put down the apple cider recipe pad, my pup sprawled out refusing to get out of the stroller... The design is so pretty and there's nothing missing from apple cider recipe. Please restock the guard soon! I want to coordinate the whole set 😭❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 색상 사이즈 딱 좋아요 잘 사용하겠습니다
reviews.content_en: The color and size are just right. I'll use it well

reviews.name: 주****
reviews.content:
유모차 사면 무조건 애플사이다레시피 가드랑 방석 사려고 했어서, 개모차 사자마자 바로 구매했어요!
샌드그레이 컬러 개모차에 찰떡으로 귀여워요!
저희 강아지도 푹신해서 더 잘 탈 거 같아요ㅎㅎㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I was set on buying the APPLE CIDER RECIPE guard and pad whenever I got a stroller, so I bought them right after getting the pet stroller! The sand gray color looks absolutely adorable with our pet stroller! Our puppy should ride even more comfortably with the fluffy padding ㅎㅎㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 홍****
reviews.content: 보자마자 혹해서 샀습니다 핑크, 그린 조합은 사랑이죠 댕카는 피카노리 위니 주니어 사용하는데 m사이즈 딱이네요 귀엽고 좋습니다 울집 강쥐가 좀 더 편하게 있을 수 있겠어용
reviews.content_en: I fell in love as soon as I saw it and bought it! The pink and green combo is love! My Pika uses the Picano Lee Winnie Junior and the M size fits perfectly. It's cute and great - my pup will be even more comfortable now

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 개인적으로 좋아하는 브랜드라 하나씩 모으는 중이에요 너무 예뻐요
reviews.content_en: It's a brand I personally love, so I'm collecting it piece by piece. It's so beautiful

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 생각보다 푹신함은 덜한데 그래도 너무 예뻐용 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: It's less fluffy than I thought, but it's still so pretty ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 아 디자인 너무 이뻐요 가드도 같이 구매하고 싶었는데ㅠㅠㅠ다시 판매하는거 기다리는중입니닷,, 다른거는 눈에 안들어옴,,
reviews.content_en: Ah, the design is so pretty! I wanted to buy the guard too ㅠㅠㅠ I'm waiting for it to be back in stock... Nothing else catches my eye anymore

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 깔끔하니 너무 예뻐요.^^  노견이라 매일 유모차 타는데 기분도 좋아지는 제품입니다.
reviews.content_en: It's so clean and pretty. ^^  Our senior dog rides the stroller every day and this product really brightens the mood!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 디자인도 이쁘고 가볍고 붙러워요 잘 사용하겠습니다
reviews.content_en: The design is pretty, it's lightweight and comfortable. I'll use it well

reviews.name: 오****
reviews.content_en: I love the color and my dog loves it too!

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content_en: Royal Tailor M size fits perfectly!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
유모차도 없는데 라이너부터 구매했습니다.(사실...당근...)
기존에 판매중인 제품들은 마음에 드는 상품이 없어서 고민중이였는데
딱 제품 보자마자 바로 결갈... 앞으로 이런 감각적인 제품 많이 만들어주세요!
소재도 너무 좋고 가격도 합리적인거 같아
다른컬러 나오면 또 구매하고파요!
reviews.content_en: I bought the liner before even having a stroller. (Well... obviously...) I was torn because I didn't like any of the existing products, but the moment I saw this one, I made the decision immediately... Please keep making products with this kind of sensible design! The material is great and the price seems reasonable too. If other colors come out, I'll buy again!

reviews.name: 송****
reviews.content: 시어서커 재질 나왔다고 해서 구매했어요.  고슬고슬한 촉감이 즇아여
reviews.content_en: I bought it because I heard they released a seersucker material. The texture feels so nice and crispy

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 색상이 참 예쁘네요 바스락인형도 보내주셔서 고맙습니다
reviews.content_en: The color is really pretty. Thank you for sending the crinkle toy too

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content_en: It's a bit long for the Airbuggy so I'm sad about that
